Elijah Harkless

Position: Guard

6-3, 195lb (190cm, 88kg)

Hometown: Rialto, CA

High School: Etiwanda HS

Schools: Cal State Northridge (Men), Oklahoma (Men) and Nevada-Las Vegas (Men)

  • 2022-23 All-MWC
+2
